allowedFamilies.name: runtime-status
constraints: Use status and inspection forms only.
Filter output to the named process, service, container, or port.

allowedFamilies.name: safe-health-check
constraints: Use only unauthenticated local or explicitly approved public health endpoints.
Do not send credentials, cookies, or mutation methods.

approvalExceptions: A named public health endpoint or bounded non-secret log may be approved.
